payload.answer: The proposal contains an unresolved pronoun (“He”) and an underspecified referent (“the other one”), so it can’t be safely committed as-is.
citations: LLM proposal: {"memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"He prefers the other one.","confidence":"medium"}]}
repair_options: Clarify who “he” refers to, then restate the preference.
Clarify what “the other one” refers to, then restate the preference.
If you want to preserve uncertainty, record it as an unresolved note rather than a committed preference.
Provide the full preference in a form that does not rely on pronouns or comparison context.
